preamble: Skeptical functional verification of PyArcana: only real execution counts. Mocks/logs/TODOs as product success are P0/P1.

pre_round_research_sources: Google SRE / production readiness reviews — verify SLOs with real probes
Microsoft/Azure well-architected reliability — end-to-end dependency checks
Playwright best practices 2025-2026 — auto-wait, no sleep-based fakes
evidence_types_accepted: HTTP status + body from live server
Python demo stdout matching expected metrics
Playwright assertion against rendered DOM / state files
evidence_types_rejected: mock handlers as proof of integration

Spanish word Todo / CSS placeholder: as false TODO positives

severity.P0: Broken core path, data loss, security hole, fake success
severity.P1: Feature claimed but non-functional for main users

success_criteria: S01 8 demos / 24 exercises + exam bank 24 per section in DB
Auth credentials path works against live DB
Exam start/submit returns real scored results
retrospection: Playbook established and applied through Phase 7; success criteria met with evidence.
